value: Waiting for You in a City
Wo De Ren Jian Yan Hou

synopsis.value:
Song Yan and Xu Qin were once best friends, but their families forced them apart. Ten years later, they’ve each built successful careers, Song Yan as a fire chief and Xu Qin as an emergency doctor. Fate reunites them through their work, though neither is eager to reconnect. As they work together, they must navigate the challenges of their past and present to determine if their relationship can grow beyond its fleeting

nature.
